articles.title: Advanced Tree Counting: Mathematical Layouts With `sibling-index()` And `sibling-count()`
articles.summary: Meet `sibling-index()` and `sibling-count()`. Staggered cascade effect in one line of CSS without `:nth-child()` rules or JS workarounds. Works for 5 items or 5,000.
